data.name: BMCE OPV Platform
content: A web and mobile platform for BMCE OPV workflows, designed to support both internal administration and client-side request journeys.
The screenshots show the login experience, OPV administration, dashboard visibility, and the mobile flow for browsing and submitting requests.
Built with a product-first mindset, the project puts authentication, role-based access, and operational reliability at the center of the experience.

data.name: Todo Planner
content: A full-stack planning application designed to make personal organization feel fast, clear, and low-friction.
The product combines task tracking, scheduling, categorization, and reminders in a workflow that stays usable across desktop and mobile devices.
It reflects my interest in building complete products where interface quality, backend logic, and security-aware implementation all matter.

data.name: Portfolio Terminal
content: An interactive portfolio that combines a visual interface with a terminal-inspired navigation mode.
The goal was to make the site memorable without losing usability: bilingual content, theme switching, keyboard navigation, and a small command-line experience all live in the same product.
It is also a showcase of how far careful vanilla JavaScript, CSS, and HTML can go when the structure is deliberate.
